name: GLAXOSMITHKLINE SP. ADR/2
summary: GlaxoSmithKline (GSK) is a global pharmaceutical company engaged in the research, development, and manufacturing of vaccines, specialty medicines, and general medicines; this refers to the ADR (American Depositary Receipt). The company's portfolio includes treatments for a wide range of diseases, including respiratory illnesses, HIV, and cancer; GSK is headquartered in Brentford, United Kingdom. GSK is headquartered in Brentford, United Kingdom.
